title: genista anglica var. subinermis
intro: Genista anglica var. subinermis, also known as English broom, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The plant is rich in isoflavones, which have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing the risk of heart disease and osteoporosis. Genista anglica var. subinermis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies for its therapeutic properties.
